questions.text: How does an agent recover from a tool execution exception in a ReAct loop?
options: By analyzing the formatted error string returned as an Observation and correcting its arguments in the next step.
questions.correct_answer: By analyzing the formatted error string returned as an Observation and correcting its arguments in the next step.
questions.explanation: Injecting the error message back into the model's context as an observation allows the model to analyze the failure and generate a corrected action.
